tasks.subject: Task 0: Limpar repositório e atualizar dependências
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remover todo código EasyPost, instalar Prisma/NextAuth/bcryptjs/@react-pdf/renderer

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json`
- Create: `.env.local`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] npm install sem erros
- [ ] Sem imports de firebase/stripe/genai

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", ".env.local"], "verifyCommand": "npm install", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm install sem erros"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Prisma schema, seed e lib/prisma.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Criar banco SQLite com todos os models e popular com dados iniciais.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "prisma/seed.ts", "src/lib/prisma.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run db:push && npm run db:seed", "acceptanceCriteria": ["banco criado", "seed insere Coral e admin"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: NextAuth config, middleware e tipos de sessão
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Auth com credentials, JWT, proteção de rotas.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/auth.ts", "src/middleware.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["middleware protege rotas"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Tipos de domínio e funções de cálculo
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tipos TypeScript e funções puras de cálculo.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/types/index.ts", "src/lib/calculations.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["calcPackages Math.ceil", "sem erros de tipo"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Layout global, GlobalHeader, StatusBadge e CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Layout raiz, GlobalHeader, StatusBadge, globals.css limpo.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/globals.css", "src/app/layout.tsx", "src/components/GlobalHeader.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/redireciona para /login"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Páginas de autenticação (login + register)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Login e cadastro funcionais.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx", "src/app/(auth)/register/page.tsx", "src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["login admin funciona", "registro cria pintor"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Dashboard do pintor e Server Actions de orçamento
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dashboard com lista e Server Actions CRUD.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/budget.ts", "src/app/(painter)/dashboard/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/dashboard carrega"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Wizard de criação de orçamento (etapas 1–4)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wizard completo com calculadora de área.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/(painter)/orcamento/novo/components/BudgetWizard.tsx", "src/app/(painter)/orcamento/novo/components/AreaCalculator.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wizard funciona", "Coral pré-selecionada", "Math.ceil"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Detalhe de orçamento, resumo público e PDF
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Detalhe, resumo público e PDF.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/(painter)/orcamento/[id]/page.tsx", "src/app/resumo/[id]/page.tsx", "src/app/api/pdf/[id]/route.ts", "src/lib/pdf.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/resumo sem login", "PDF gerado"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Área administrativa (produtos + pintores)
tasks.description:

{"files": ["src/lib/products.ts", "src/app/admin/"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["admin cria produto", "pintor redirecionado"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
